# Full entity hierarchy: galaxy → system → planet
# Star chart DB is created on first command that requires it.

# Create galaxy
exec orbiter galaxy add acme-corp
stdout 'galaxy.*acme-corp.*registered'

# Survey galaxy
exec orbiter survey acme-corp
stdout 'entity'
stdout 'acme-corp'
stdout 'unverified'

# Create system under galaxy
exec orbiter system add frontend --galaxy acme-corp
stdout 'system.*frontend.*registered'

# Survey system
exec orbiter survey frontend
stdout 'entity'
stdout 'frontend'

# Create planet under galaxy (no system required)
exec orbiter planet add payments-api --galaxy acme-corp
stdout 'planet.*payments-api.*registered'

# Survey planet — shows resource/transponder/callsign counts
exec orbiter survey payments-api
stdout 'entity'
stdout 'payments-api'
stdout 'resources.*0'
stdout 'transponders.*0'

# Scan with no resources reports nothing attached
exec orbiter scan payments-api
stdout 'no resources attached'

# Chart with no resources reports nothing to chart
exec orbiter chart payments-api
stdout 'no resources to chart'

# Create planet under system
exec orbiter planet add auth-service --galaxy acme-corp --system frontend
stdout 'planet.*auth-service.*registered'

exec orbiter survey auth-service
stdout 'auth-service'
